About Me

Turning Data into
Strategic Impact

I am a data-driven problem solver with a background in Systems and Industrial Engineering, specializing in data analysis, quantitative modeling, and business intelligence.

Through roles as Laboratory Assistant, Project Analyst, and Managerial Trainer, I have honed skills in statistical analysis, market research, and process optimization.

At 180 Degrees Consulting ITS, I conducted market research and data visualization, achieving a 15% improvement in operational efficiency. As a Laboratory Assistant, I developed quantitative models that enhanced decision-making accuracy by 20%.

Data Analyst — turning data into actionable business insights
Business Intelligence Analyst — dashboards & reporting
Consultant — process optimization & business strategy
